commands.guard: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 -m compileall -q hipengine tests scripts && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 pytest -q tests/test_generation_batch_scheduler.py tests/test_generation_qwen35_paro.py tests/test_qwen35_resident_batch_layout.py tests/test_kvcache_policy.py tests/test_kvcache_spans.py tests/test_server_api.py -q && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_correctness.py --rows 2 --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-primitive-c2.json && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_correctness.py --rows 8 --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-primitive-c8.json
commands.profiled_c4: env -u HIPENGINE_QWEN35_PROJECTION_DISPATCH_ARTIFACT HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 rocprofv3 --kernel-trace --output-format csv -d /tmp/hipengine-iter375-c4-first6-profiler-baseline/raw -o c4-first6 -- python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_retained_bench.py --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --fixture /tmp/hipengine-prebench/fixtures/qwen36_paro_8x512_prompt_ids.json --prompt-length 512 --batch-size 4 --decode-tokens 128 --warmup-decode-tokens 8 --max-layers 40 --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-retained/hipcc-version.txt --require-cached-build --json /tmp/hipengine-iter375-c4-first6-profiler-baseline/c4-first6-profiler-bench.json

conclusion: Current c4 first-six default now has fresh runtime evidence: the profiled no-baseline rocprofv3 smoke stayed [137]*4 and produced a captured profiler summary with expected native batch full-attention context/KV, grouped-MoE, accepted c-aware projection, row-aware output GEMV, and batched sampler kernels. The retained-bench attachment loaded c1, c4 serial-bridge, primitive c4 correctness, and that profiler while preserving [137]*4. Scaling references are complete (aggregate_vs_c1=1.1075, aggregate_vs_serial_bridge=1.3711), but this remains evidence-only because first-six rowchunk full attention keeps native_caware_decode=false and the profiler command is a no-baseline smoke rather than the exact retained-attachment command. No retained throughput/scaling claim is made.

prompt_verifier.evidence: PASS: this refreshes required current c4 first-six profiler/scaling runtime evidence with generated-token equality [137]*4, primitive correctness, c1/serial baselines, expected profiler kernels, active c2 verify, and GPU1/XTX provenance. It explicitly makes no retained throughput/scaling claim.
